title: School Election 2013, National Study
description: "School Election 2013, National Study" is a national opinion poll (telephone interview) conducted by Sentio Research on behalf of Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research. The questions included in the poll are some of the same ones that were asked of upper secondary school students in the school choice survey 2013. The survey was carried out in the period 26 August - 6 September 2013. Information about School Election can be found at the internet address: https://sikt.no/skolevalg
